/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/main.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/MiniServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/ThreadPool/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/HttpConn/HttpConn.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/SqlConnPool/SqlConnPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/utils/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/services/BusinessHandler.cpp.o -o main  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
